scripts.build: cd backend && bun run build && cd ../frontend && bun run build
scripts.test: cd backend && bun run test && cd ../frontend && bun run test
scripts.lint: bun run lint:backend && bun run lint:frontend
scripts.format: cd backend && bun run format && cd ../frontend && bun run format
scripts.check: cd backend && bun run check && cd ../frontend && bun run check
